Paris Saint-Germain 24/25 Home Jersey — Nike Stadium Edition

The PSG 24/25 home jersey is a bold statement of Parisian identity. The iconic Hechter stripe design is restored to the traditional centre of the shirt — a modern and daring interpretation rendered as paintbrush strokes, paying respectful homage to Paris' legendary street-art culture.

  • Nike Dri-FIT technology — moves sweat away for quicker evaporation
  • Embroidered PSG club crest and Nike Swoosh on chest
  • 100% recycled polyester fabric — lightweight and breathable
  • Replica Stadium fit — comfortable for match days and everyday wear
  • Ribbed crewneck collar with clean, minimal finishing
